blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,256 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 71".
